mapper.sql: id, invoiceId, invoiceNo, orderNo, orderItem, orderItemSplit, pre_qty, invoice_qty, po_qty, update_time, handle_status, remark, do_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.temp_merge_inv
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.temp_merge_inv (id, invoiceId, invoiceNo, orderNo, orderItem, orderItemSplit, pre_qty, invoice_qty, po_qty, update_time, handle_status, remark, do_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderitemsplit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{preQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{handleStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.temp_merge_inv
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderItem = #{record.orderitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},

handle_status = #{record.handleStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.temp_merge_inv set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderItem = #{record.orderitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orderItemSplit = #{record.orderitemsplit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pre_qty = #{record.preQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_qty = #{record.invoiceQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, po_qty = #{record.poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, handle_status = #{record.handleStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

invoiceId = #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

invoice_qty = #{invoiceQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
handle_status = #{handleStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
